title: selaginella rotundifolia
intro: Selaginella rotundifolia, also known as the spikemoss, is a small, terrestrial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae, often found in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella rotundifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
